title: Navigating AI Interviewers
description: An independent look at the AI Interviewer category: what the tools actually do, how they compare, and how to make a defensible buying decision.

title: Human-Centric AI in HR: The Four Frameworks Toolkit
description: Council members walk through the four practitioner-built frameworks on AI literacy, governance, adoption, and the future of HR.

title: AI Town Hall
description: A live session with HR practitioners on the front lines of AI adoption. Council members, real questions, no vendor spin.

title: The New ROI: Cathy Peterman on Engineering Productivity in the AI Era
description: How Wayfair integrates AI in the workplace — engineering productivity metrics, business impact measurement, and what real collaboration between HR and engineering teams looks like.

title: The Culture of Learning: Jason Desentz on Leading HR at Toshiba
description: Toshiba's CHRO on AI agents in HR, process-driven approaches, and developing new competency frameworks for organizational resilience.

title: The Indispensable Recruiter: Rocki Howard on Staying Human in an AI World
description: Diversiology founder Rocki Howard on how AI enhances — not replaces — the human elements of recruiting: judgment, relationships, and the things that actually can't be automated.

title: By the Numbers: GEM's Steve Bartel on the Real State of Recruiting
description: CEO Steve Bartel on how efficiency pressures are reshaping hiring — AI adoption challenges, what the data actually shows, and how recruiting teams can stay ahead.

title: Beyond the Algorithm: Joe Shaker on Creativity in Recruitment Marketing
description: Third-generation recruitment marketing leader Joe Shaker on storytelling, employer branding differentiation, and how to balance technology with the human connection that actually moves candidates.

title: Invisible Software, Real Impact: Paradox on Frictionless Hiring
description: Paradox leadership on how AI-powered software removes hiring friction through intelligent scheduling and seamless backend automation — when tech gets out of the way, people move faster.

title: Workday's Big Play: Redefining HR Tech with Bold Innovation and Trust
description: Workday's General Manager on platform innovation through Extend and the Built on Workday marketplace — what customer-centricity actually looks like when you're building at scale.

title: No upcoming sessions scheduled
description: Check back soon — new sessions are added regularly.

title: AI in HR: Navigating the real opportunities and hype
description: Kyle on navigating market hype cycles, enhancing HR's strategic credibility, and selecting AI solutions thoughtfully rather than chasing trends.

title: Transformation Realness Live: Skills-Based Everything
description: A panel on how skills-based solutions are shaping workforce strategy — state of HR tech, practical applications, and what "skills-based" actually requires to work.

title: Human Leadership in the AI Era: HR's Evolving Mandate
description: Why HR must lead — not support — organizational AI strategy. Only 14% of orgs report HR leading their AI initiatives. That has to change.

title: Mobley vs. Workday: What the Case Means for HR Tech
description: A discussion on the legal and governance implications of the landmark AI bias case — and what it means for HR teams evaluating algorithmic tools.
